linkedin.title: Most news apps treat everyone the same, but the truth is that we all care about different things.
linkedin.body:
When we started building Headlinne, we wanted to fix the noise. We noticed that most people get overwhelmed by generic news feeds filled with stories that just do not matter to them.

We built a recommendation engine that works differently. Instead of guessing based on broad categories, it pays attention to what you actually engage with. If you read a piece about local urban planning, it learns that you are interested in community issues. If you skip over celebrity gossip, it learns to show you less of that.

It is not about tracking your every move. It is about building a feedback loop where your time is respected. The more you use it, the better it gets at curating a feed that feels like it was written just for you. It is a simple concept, but it changes how you consume information every morning.
linkedin.cta: If you are tired of the noise, you can see how we are doing it differently at HEADLINNE.com.

instagram.title: Top 5 Things In Tech Today

slides.headline: The Avengers are back
slides.explanation: The first trailer for Avengers: Doomsday has arrived. It teases a new threat that the heroes might struggle to stop.

slides.headline: Google builds a new AI chip
slides.explanation: Google is reportedly developing a custom chip to help its Gemini AI models run more efficiently. This could make the tech faster and cheaper to operate.

slides.headline: A rare deal on an LG gaming monitor
slides.explanation: LG's 27-inch OLED gaming monitor is currently on sale for $379.99. This is the lowest price we have seen for this screen since it launched.

slides.headline: Sony sues AI music generator
slides.explanation: Sony Music is suing Udio for copyright infringement. The label claims the AI tool used over 30,000 of its songs, including hits from Beyoncé and Elvis Presley, without permission.

slides.headline: AT&T loses California court ruling
slides.explanation: AT&T failed to get permission to stop providing basic phone service in California. The company says it will keep fighting the state rules through other legal channels.

instagram.caption: From major AI lawsuits to a big gaming monitor deal, here is the tech news you need to know today. Swipe through to catch up on the latest headlines in just a few seconds. Stay informed with Headlinne. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.

instagram.title: Top 5 Geopolitics Headlines

slides.headline: Andy Burnham walks a fiscal tightrope
slides.explanation: The incoming leader is trying to avoid market instability with his early economic policies. His team knows that any missteps right now could be costly.

slides.headline: Sinaloa cartel leader gets life sentence
slides.explanation: Ismael Zambada García, also known as El Mayo, was sentenced to life in a US federal court. He was a key figure in leading the violent Sinaloa cartel.

slides.headline: Wildfire smoke drifts across the border
slides.explanation: Smoke from US wildfires is now affecting air quality in Canada. This comes just days after Donald Trump threatened Canada with tariffs over wildfire management.

slides.headline: Record heat hits Australian ski resorts
slides.explanation: Ski areas in New South Wales and Victoria saw record-breaking July temperatures this past weekend. It was 12 degrees Celsius above the usual average for this time of year.

slides.headline: US strikes on Iran continue
slides.explanation: The US military has shared video footage showing another night of strikes against targets in Iran. This marks the tenth night in a row of military action in the region.

instagram.caption: Stay up to date with the latest global news in just a few minutes. From economic shifts in the UK to ongoing military developments, here is what you need to know today. Download the Headlinne app for more stories curated just for you. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.
